Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC940 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Heroes of Karn, The.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $ca80 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $ca00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Heroes of Karn, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $CA00 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Note: also removed the loading messages from screen memory and restored the word "The" above the Heroes of Karn title text.
